surface_verification.justification: Static client-only render change in the Add-Project wizard (FR-01.03): removed the clipboard Paste button and reworded the directory hint. No API route, store mutation, SSE/WS handler, or message contract touched, so the Backend-affects-Frontend rule does not trigger. The full observable outcome (Paste button + testid absent, new hint text present, path input still editable and driving onPathChange) is deterministically asserted by ProjectWizard.test.tsx which mounts the real ProjectWizard -> ProjectInfoStep tree; full client suite 1812/1812 green. small-complexity CHANGE+UI: phase matrix does not require E2E.

behaviors.behavior: Paste button no longer renders in the Add-Project wizard directory step
behaviors.evidence: ProjectWizard.test.tsx 'has no paste button and instructs the user to paste the path in' PASSED — queryByTestId('project-path-paste') and queryByText('Paste') both absent

behaviors.behavior: Directory-step hint instructs the user to copy the path and paste it in
behaviors.evidence: ProjectWizard.test.tsx same test asserts getByText('Copy the full path from Explorer/Finder and paste it in here.')

behaviors.behavior: Directory input stays editable and drives onPathChange
behaviors.evidence: ProjectWizard.test.tsx 'navigates to step 2 on Next' types into the path input and advances the wizard PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Removing filePicker.ts leaves no dangling references (dead-code deletion is clean)
behaviors.evidence: tsc --noEmit exit 0 + repo-wide grep: no filePicker/pasteFromClipboard/looksLikePath references remain in client source
